title: Human Review + Go/No-Go Decision
description: Run 5-bucket human review on 20-30 representative samples. Compile evidence package. Make go/no-go launch decision.
acceptance_criteria: 20-30 samples selected from eval results (stratified: errors + boundary + random + anti-pattern)
Each sample classified into one of 5 buckets: correct/abstained/unsupported-query/wrong-with-citation/permission-boundary-failure
Two reviewers per sample, Cohen's kappa >= 0.7
Evidence package compiled: pinned bundle + eval results + human review + permission preflight + rollback docs
implementation_steps: 1. Select 20-30 stratified samples from IMPL-006/IMPL-007 results
2. Create human review form with 5-bucket classification
4. Compute bucket counts and Cohen's kappa
